title: 🔴 The AI Coding Marketplace is Finally LIVE!
summary: The Archon Workflow Marketplace officially launched for community submissions. The platform includes an auto-review pipeline built by Archon itself, running on the marketplace infrastructure. The first wave of submissions was processed through the automated review system during a livestream.
